case_title: HOSSEIN GHEZAVAT VS. AUDRIC CHONG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GHEZAVAT, HOSSEIN AS TO DEFENDANT CHONG, AUDRIC INFUSION LOUNGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHEZAVAT, HOSSEIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25.00) SERVED JUL-15-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHONG, AUDRIC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25.00) SERVED JUL-15-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT INFUSION LOUNGE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT INFUSION LOUNGE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT INFUSION LOUNGE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-01-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT INFUSION LOUNGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT AUDRIC CHONG, G.M. OF INFUSION LOUNGE PRESENT ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GHEZAVAT, HOSSEIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHONG, AUDRIC INFUSION LOUNGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
